  2. arXiv:2603.25265

    ViewSplat: View-Adaptive Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Feed-Forward Synthesis

    Moonyeon Jeong, Seunggi Min

    View-adaptive 3D Gaussian splatting network for novel view synthesis from unposed images.

    Submitted 26 March, 2026;
